case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. RANGER INSURANCE CO. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE CO. DE SOTO BAIL BONDS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE CO. DE SOTO BAIL BONDS $25,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,080.00
COMPARE AND/OR CERTIFY A COPY OF ANY RECORD ON FILE REGISTER OF ACTIONS FILED BY DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE CO. DE SOTO BAIL BONDS
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE CO. DE SOTO BAIL BONDS HEARING SET FOR AUG-11-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO STAY PROCEEDINGS EXPARTE MOTION FOR ORDER & ORDER STAYING ENFORCEMENT OF SUMMARY JUDGMENT UNTIL HRG OF MOTION TO S/A SUMMARY JUDGMENTS AND EXONERATE BONDS FILED BY DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE CO.
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, CALENDAR OF AUG-11-1993, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER
ORDER VACATING SUMMARY JUDGMENTS & SETTING ASIDE BAIL FORFEITURES AND EXONERATON OF BONDS FILED BY DEFENDANT
SERVICE FEE CERTIFIED COPY PLUS PHOTOCOPY. FILED BY THIRD PARTY HEREDIA,LUIS
